use_cases: Viewing and navigating PDF documents with zoom controls from 0.25x to 8x
Searching and highlighting text patterns across PDF pages
Rotating PDF pages for better viewing orientation
Browsing multi-page PDF documents with thumbnail navigation
Collapsible sidebar interface for focused document viewing
ai_summary: A comprehensive PDF viewer component built with react-pdf that provides zoom, rotation, page navigation, and text search capabilities. Features a collapsible sidebar layout with thumbnail previews, standard shadcn/ui controls, and supports document loading with progressive page rendering. Ideal for document-heavy applications requiring in-browser PDF viewing with basic annotation controls.
